intro.de: A calm-tech identity for a sound-hardware company — a system built to breathe.
intro.en: A calm-tech identity for a sound-hardware company — a system built to breathe.

de: Halcyon makes high-fidelity listening hardware. The brief was to make a technology brand feel like an instrument: precise, warm, and unhurried.
We built the identity around a single modulating mark and a motion grammar tied to waveform — every transition eases like sound settling into a room.
en: Halcyon makes high-fidelity listening hardware. The brief was to make a technology brand feel like an instrument: precise, warm, and unhurried.
We built the identity around a single modulating mark and a motion grammar tied to waveform — every transition eases like sound settling into a room.

intro.de: Art direction for a temporary architecture biennale staged across a harbour.
intro.en: Art direction for a temporary architecture biennale staged across a harbour.

de: Pavilion invited twelve studios to build temporary structures along Copenhagen's waterfront. Our role was the visual world that tied them together.
A wayfinding-led system used scale and shadow as the primary devices — photography shot at dawn to catch the long light the structures were designed for.
en: Pavilion invited twelve studios to build temporary structures along Copenhagen's waterfront. Our role was the visual world that tied them together.
A wayfinding-led system used scale and shadow as the primary devices — photography shot at dawn to catch the long light the structures were designed for.

intro.de: Main titles and identity for a nocturnal psychological thriller.
intro.en: Main titles and identity for a nocturnal psychological thriller.

de: Nocturne needed a title sequence that felt like memory under pressure — legible, then not.
Type dissolves into grain and reforms; the mark is a single serif N that behaves like a light source moving behind fog.
en: Nocturne needed a title sequence that felt like memory under pressure — legible, then not.
Type dissolves into grain and reforms; the mark is a single serif N that behaves like a light source moving behind fog.

intro.de: A 320-page monograph on contemporary Nordic landscape photography.
intro.en: A 320-page monograph on contemporary Nordic landscape photography.

de: Meridian collects two decades of landscape work into a single volume. The design had to disappear behind the images while holding a strong spine of typography.
A modular grid lets full-bleed plates breathe against quiet captions; three paper stocks separate the book's movements.
en: Meridian collects two decades of landscape work into a single volume. The design had to disappear behind the images while holding a strong spine of typography.
A modular grid lets full-bleed plates breathe against quiet captions; three paper stocks separate the book's movements.

intro.de: Identity for an independent publisher of translated fiction.
intro.en: Identity for an independent publisher of translated fiction.

de: Verso publishes fiction in translation. The mark plays on the recto/verso of a page — a flippable monogram that reads both ways.
A flexible spine system lets every title share a shelf while keeping its own voice.
en: Verso publishes fiction in translation. The mark plays on the recto/verso of a page — a flippable monogram that reads both ways.
A flexible spine system lets every title share a shelf while keeping its own voice.

intro.de: A launch campaign for a coastal outerwear label, built in CG and grain.
intro.en: A launch campaign for a coastal outerwear label, built in CG and grain.

de: Saltfield's first season needed weather. We built CG environments — fog, salt, low sun — and dropped the product into them.
The result sits between product film and landscape painting; stills were pulled directly from the render for print.
en: Saltfield's first season needed weather. We built CG environments — fog, salt, low sun — and dropped the product into them.
The result sits between product film and landscape painting; stills were pulled directly from the render for print.

intro.de: A living index of a research institute's archive, rendered in WebGL.
intro.en: A living index of a research institute's archive, rendered in WebGL.

de: Atlas needed its public archive to feel alive rather than filed. We built a navigable index where entries drift and cluster by relation.
A custom WebGL layer handles the field of entries at 60fps; everything degrades gracefully to a static index without JS.
en: Atlas needed its public archive to feel alive rather than filed. We built a navigable index where entries drift and cluster by relation.
A custom WebGL layer handles the field of entries at 60fps; everything degrades gracefully to a static index without JS.

intro.de: A self-initiated photographic study of the North Sea at its lowest tide.
intro.en: A self-initiated photographic study of the North Sea at its lowest tide.

de: Low Tide is a year of returning to the same stretch of coast at the lowest water of each month.
The edit became a small book and an exhibition — a study in how little needs to change for everything to.
en: Low Tide is a year of returning to the same stretch of coast at the lowest water of each month.
The edit became a small book and an exhibition — a study in how little needs to change for everything to.

intro.de: Identity for a precision cinema-lens manufacturer.
intro.en: Identity for a precision cinema-lens manufacturer.

de: Aperture grinds lenses for cinema. The mark is an iris that opens across applications.
A monochrome system keeps focus on the optics themselves.
en: Aperture grinds lenses for cinema. The mark is an iris that opens across applications.
A monochrome system keeps focus on the optics themselves.

intro.de: A quarterly journal of fieldwork and design research.
intro.en: A quarterly journal of fieldwork and design research.

de: Field Notes gathers essays from designers working outside the studio.
A utilitarian grid and a single accent keep the writing foremost.
en: Field Notes gathers essays from designers working outside the studio.
A utilitarian grid and a single accent keep the writing foremost.

intro.de: Packaging for a small-batch coffee roaster.
intro.en: Packaging for a small-batch coffee roaster.

de: Cinder roasts dark. The packaging leans into char — matte black with a single burned mark.
A tactile, unbleached stock carries the range across origins.
en: Cinder roasts dark. The packaging leans into char — matte black with a single burned mark.
A tactile, unbleached stock carries the range across origins.

intro.de: A motion identity for a conversation-led podcast network.
intro.en: A motion identity for a conversation-led podcast network.

de: Murmur needed an identity you could hear. The mark animates to voice — a waveform that gathers and disperses.
A toolkit of loops lets each show brand itself within the system.
en: Murmur needed an identity you could hear. The mark animates to voice — a waveform that gathers and disperses.
A toolkit of loops lets each show brand itself within the system.

intro.de: Identity for an architectural lighting studio.
intro.en: Identity for an architectural lighting studio.

de: Halo designs light for buildings. The mark is a soft ring that behaves like a fixture across surfaces.
Warm neutrals and generous space let the work glow.
en: Halo designs light for buildings. The mark is a soft ring that behaves like a fixture across surfaces.
Warm neutrals and generous space let the work glow.

intro.de: Spatial and graphic design for a mineralogy exhibition.
intro.en: Spatial and graphic design for a mineralogy exhibition.

de: Quartz brought a museum's mineral collection into the light for the first time in decades.
Vitrine typography and a crystalline wayfinding system guided visitors through formation, structure and use.
en: Quartz brought a museum's mineral collection into the light for the first time in decades.
Vitrine typography and a crystalline wayfinding system guided visitors through formation, structure and use.
